mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyI18nMsg :: selectById */ m.* , cd_lc.code_label AS lang_cd_nm FROM sy_i18n_msg m LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_lc ON cd_lc.code_grp = 'LANG_CODE' AND cd_lc.code_value = m.lang_cd WHERE m.i18n_msg_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.sy :: SyI18nMsg :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_i18n_msg m
